languages.text: "Ваша Светлость! Муки тела не покидают меня, но я сильнее. Я должен превозмогать ради моей паствы. Здесь многие нуждаются в словах веры — раненые, умирающие, и те, кто их исцеляет или провожает в последний путь".

"Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! The torments of the flesh do not leave me, but I am stronger. For the sake of my flock, I must prevail. Many here need words of faith — the wounded, the dying, and those who heal them or guide them on their final journey."
languages.original_text: "Ваша Светлость! Муки тела не покидают меня, но я сильнее. Я должен превозмогать ради моей паствы. Здесь многие нуждаются в словах веры — раненые, умирающие, и те, кто их исцеляет или провожает в последний путь".

traits.locale_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! The torments of the flesh do not leave me, but I am stronger. For the sake of my flock, I must prevail. Many here need words of faith — the wounded, the dying, and those who heal them or guide them on their final journey."

"Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! The torments of the flesh do not leave me, but I am stronger. For the sake of my flock, I must prevail. Many here need words of faith — the wounded, the dying, and those who heal them or guide them on their final journey."

"Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! The torments of the flesh do not leave me, but I am stronger. For the sake of my flock, I must prevail. Many here need words of faith — the wounded, the dying, and those who heal them or guide them on their final journey."

languages.text: 「御尊顔に拝見いたします。肉体の苦痛は去りません。しかし、私は強くなっております。羊たちの為には、私は勝利せねばなりません。多くの者は信仰の言葉を必要とします。傷ついた者、死にかけている者、そして彼らを癒し、彼らを最後の旅路に導く者たち」
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! The torments of the flesh do not leave me, but I am stronger. For the sake of my flock, I must prevail. Many here need words of faith — the wounded, the dying, and those who heal them or guide them on their final journey."

traits.locale_text: 「御尊顔に拝見いたします。肉体の苦痛は去りません。しかし、私は強くなっております。羊たちの為には、私は勝利せねばなりません。多くの者は信仰の言葉を必要とします。傷ついた者、死にかけている者、そして彼らを癒し、彼らを最後の旅路に導く者たち。」

languages.text: “舰长大人！肉体的折磨没有放过我，但我更坚强了。为了我的信众，我必须战胜它。这里有太多人亟需信仰之言的抚慰——受伤的人，垂死的人，以及那些治愈他们，或引导他们走完最后一程的人。”
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! The torments of the flesh do not leave me, but I am stronger. For the sake of my flock, I must prevail. Many here need words of faith — the wounded, the dying, and those who heal them or guide them on their final journey."

traits.locale_text: “舰长大人！肉体的折磨没有放过我，但我更坚强了。为了我的信众，我必须战胜它。这里有太多人亟需信仰之言的抚慰——受伤的人，垂死的人，以及那些治愈他们，或引导他们走完最后一程的人。”

languages.text: « Votre Seigneurie ! Les tourments de la chair continuent de m'assaillir, mais je suis plus fort. Au nom de mes ouailles, je dois les surmonter. Ils sont nombreux ici à avoir besoin d'entendre la bonne parole : les blessés, les mourants et ceux qui les soignent ou les guident jusqu'à la fin de leur dernier voyage. »
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! The torments of the flesh do not leave me, but I am stronger. For the sake of my flock, I must prevail. Many here need words of faith — the wounded, the dying, and those who heal them or guide them on their final journey."

traits.locale_text: « Votre Seigneurie ! Les tourments de la chair continuent de m'assaillir, mais je suis plus fort. Au nom de mes ouailles, je dois les surmonter. Ils sont nombreux ici à avoir besoin d'entendre la bonne parole : les blessés, les mourants et ceux qui les soignent ou les guident jusqu'à la fin de leur dernier voyage. »

languages.text: «¡Mi{mf|lord|lady}! Los tormentos de la carne no me abandonan, pero soy más fuerte. Por el bien de mi rebaño, debo prevalecer. Muchos necesitan oír las palabras de la fe: los heridos, los moribundos y aquellos que los curan o los guían en su último viaje».
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! The torments of the flesh do not leave me, but I am stronger. For the sake of my flock, I must prevail. Many here need words of faith — the wounded, the dying, and those who heal them or guide them on their final journey."

traits.locale_text: «¡Mi{mf|lord|lady}! Los tormentos de la carne no me abandonan, pero soy más fuerte. Por el bien de mi rebaño, debo prevalecer. Muchos necesitan oír las palabras de la fe: los heridos, los moribundos y aquellos que los curan o los guían en su último viaje».

languages.text: "{mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri! Bedenin eziyetleri beni bırakmıyor ama ben daha güçlüyüm. Sürüm uğruna dayanmalıyım. Buradaki birçokları; yaralılar, ölmekte olanlar ve onları iyileştirenler veya son yolculuklarında onlara rehberlik edenler inanç dolu sözlere muhtaç"
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! The torments of the flesh do not leave me, but I am stronger. For the sake of my flock, I must prevail. Many here need words of faith — the wounded, the dying, and those who heal them or guide them on their final journey."

traits.locale_text: "{mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri! Bedenin eziyetleri beni bırakmıyor ama ben daha güçlüyüm. Sürüm uğruna dayanmalıyım. Buradaki birçokları; yaralılar, ölmekte olanlar ve onları iyileştirenler veya son yolculuklarında onlara rehberlik edenler inanç dolu sözlere muhtaç"

languages.text: "Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}! Die Qualen des Fleischs lassen nicht nach, aber ich bin stärker. Ich muss für meine Herde überleben. Viele hier brauchen Worte des Glaubens ... die Verwundeten, die Sterbenden und jene, die sie heilen oder auf ihrer letzten Reise begleiten."
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! The torments of the flesh do not leave me, but I am stronger. For the sake of my flock, I must prevail. Many here need words of faith — the wounded, the dying, and those who heal them or guide them on their final journey."

traits.locale_text: "Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}! Die Qualen des Fleischs lassen nicht nach, aber ich bin stärker. Ich muss für meine Herde überleben. Viele hier brauchen Worte des Glaubens ... die Verwundeten, die Sterbenden und jene, die sie heilen oder auf ihrer letzten Reise begleiten."
